children.heading: General authority
children.label: a General authority
children.text: Subject to the provisions of this subchapter, the Administrator shall make capitalization grants to each State for the purpose of establishing a water pollution control revolving fund to accomplish the objectives, goals, and policies of this chapter by providing assistance for projects and activities identified in .section 1383(c) of this title
such payments shall be made in quarterly installments, and

children.label: A
children.text: 8 quarters after the date such funds were obligated by the State, or

children.label: B
children.text: 12 quarters after the date such funds were allotted to the State.
